title: Fix example in `populate_by_name` documentation
body:
<!-- Thank you for your contribution! -->
<!-- Unless your change is trivial, please create an issue to discuss the change before creating a PR -->

## Change Summary

fix the docstring of ConfigDict's populate_by_name.

## Related issue number

fix #11765 

- #11765 

<!-- WARNING: please use "fix #123" style references so the issue is closed when this PR is merged. -->

## Checklist

* [ ] The pull request title is a good summary of the changes - it will be used in the changelog
* [x] Unit tests for the changes exist
* [x] Tests pass on CI
* [x] Documentation reflects the changes where applicable
* [ ] My PR is ready to review, **please add a comment including the phrase "please review" to assign reviewers**

diff_between_base_and_last.patch:
@@ -194,7 +194,7 @@ class Model(BaseModel):
         print(m)
         #> my_field='foo'
 
-        m = Model(my_alias='foo')  # (3)!
+        m = Model(my_field='foo')  # (3)!
         print(m)
         #> my_field='foo'
         ```

files.patch:
@@ -194,7 +194,7 @@ class Model(BaseModel):
         print(m)
         #> my_field='foo'
 
-        m = Model(my_alias='foo')  # (3)!
+        m = Model(my_field='foo')  # (3)!
         print(m)
         #> my_field='foo'
         ```
